title: Roast Mediterranean Lamb with Bacon
description: A flavorful and aromatic roast lamb dish infused with the bold tastes of the Mediterranean, paired with crispy bacon.
instructions: Rinse the lamb shoulder and pat it dry.
In a small bowl, mix together the minced garlic, chopped rosemary, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the garlic-rosemary mixture all over the lamb shoulder, making sure to coat it evenly.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe pan over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and roast the lamb for 20 minutes.
While the lamb is roasting, cook the bacon in a separate pan until crispy.
Remove the lamb from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced lamb with crispy bacon on top and garnish with additional rosemary if desired.
